title: Die Koffer des Herrn O.F.
writer: Alexis Granowsky, Hans Hömberg, Léo Lania
actors: Alfred Abel, Peter Lorre, Harald Paulsen
plot: In the very oldfashioned town of Ostend suddenly 13 suitcases are delivered to the hotel, with a note, that O.F. will be here soon and needs 6 rooms (the hotel just has five). This event, probably the biggest in 300 years, starts ...
